meta.source: Office for National Statistics, Labour Force Survey five-quarter longitudinal datasets, 2022-2025 (UK Data Service SN 9482-9490, End User Licence).
meta.sample: The pooled panels contain 23,078 respondents in total, of whom 851 worked in construction at their first interview and 830 a year later.
meta.note: Cells with fewer than 10 unweighted respondents are suppressed. Sample sizes are reported as ranges. Weighted values are rounded.
